shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip build && .venv/bin/python -m build'

/bin/bash -lc "bash -lc 'if [ -f .pypi-server.pid ] && kill -0 \""'$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /home/user/workspace/repo >/home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid'"'"

/bin/bash -lc "bash -lc 'nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 -d /home/user/workspace/repo </dev/null >/home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.log 2>&1 & echo "'$! > /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid; sleep 1; ps -p "$(cat /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid)" -o pid=,ppid=,cmd='"'"

/bin/bash -lc 'rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-test && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test && /tmp/vectorops-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-test/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; print(dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]))"'

/bin/bash -lc "bash -lc 'rm -f /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid; setsid -f sh -c \"echo \\"'$'"\\"'$ > /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid; exec python3 -m http.server 8080 -d /home/user/workspace/repo >/home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.log 2>&1 </dev/null"; sleep 1; ps -p "$(cat /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid)" -o pid=,ppid=,pgid=,sid=,cmd='"'"

/bin/bash -lc 'rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-test2 && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test2 && /tmp/vectorops-test2/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-test2/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]))"'

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.request
for url in [
    'http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/',
    'http://localhost:8080/dist/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl'
]:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as r:
        print(url, r.status)
PY
rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-test3 && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test3 && /tmp/vectorops-test3/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-test3/bin/python -c \"from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]))\""

/bin/bash -lc "rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-test4 && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test4 && /tmp/vectorops-test4/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-test4/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
print(dotproduct([1, 1], [0, 1]))
try:
    dotproduct([1], [1, 2])
except ValueError as exc:
    print(type(exc).__name__, str(exc))
PY"
